steps.title: Check both parts of the assertion
steps.content: Egoh and colleagues assert that every region reported effects on provisioning services and that provisioning services make up the majority overall. Supporting data must prove both regional presence and overall majority.

steps.title: Use minimum and overall values
steps.content: Choice A gives only two regions and the overall value. Choice C shows regional presence but not majority. Choice D gives the highest and lowest regional values but not the overall majority. The remaining choice establishes both required parts. The answer is B.
